title: Chad Randall
extract: Chad Randall (born 30 December 1980) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played for the Manly Sea Eagles in the National Rugby League (NRL) and the London Broncos in the Super League. Randall's usual position was at hooker. Currently, he works as an assistant coach at the Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs, and was formerly an assistant coach for Manly.
